title: bouteloua gracilis var. major
intro: Bouteloua gracilis var. major, also known as blue grama, is a type of grass native to North America, characterized by its blue-green leaves and feathery plumes. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of blue grama include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting immune function, making it a popular choice for herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of blue grama can be made into teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat various health conditions, from skin irritations to respiratory issues.
